import os, requests
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('../.env'\)
key = os.getenv\('SARVAM_API_KEY', ''\)
print\('Key set:', bool\(key\), '| first 6 chars:', key[:6] if key else 'EMPTY'\)
resp = requests.post\(
    'https://api.sarvam.ai/text-to-speech',
    headers={'api-subscription-key': key},
    json={
        'inputs': ['Hello, my order is late.'],
        'target_language_code': 'en-IN',
        'speaker': 'meera',
        'model': 'bulbul:v1',
        'enable_preprocessing': True,
    },
    timeout=30,
\)
print\('Status:', resp.status_code\)
print\('Response:', resp.text[:500]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd E:/Desktop/Projects/Druta-Kart/backend && python -c "
import os, requests, base64
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('../.env'\)
key = os.getenv\('SARVAM_API_KEY', ''\)
resp = requests.post\(
    'https://api.sarvam.ai/text-to-speech',
    headers={'api-subscription-key': key},
    json={
        'inputs': ['Hello, my order is late.'],
        'target_language_code': 'en-IN',
        'speaker': 'anushka',
        'model': 'bulbul:v2',
        'enable_preprocessing': True,
    },
    timeout=30,
\)
print\('Status:', resp.status_code\)
if resp.status_code == 200:
    audio = base64.b64decode\(\(resp.json\(\).get\('audios'\) or ['']\)[0]\)
    print\(f'Audio bytes: {len\(audio\):,} — TTS working!'\)
else:
    print\('Error:', resp.text[:300]\)
" 2>&1)
